119	class LongContextChunker:
120	    """Split a single long prefill into model-safe chunks.
121	
122	    Multimodal spans are indivisible, so a span larger than
123	    ``max_prefill_token_num`` temporarily raises the chunk limit.  Prefix-cache
124	    restore can skip over the span itself, but the enlarged limit still needs
125	    to be derived from the whole request history so the remaining text tail is
126	    chunked the same way as the no-cache path.
127	    """
128	
129	    def __init__(self, max_prefill_token_num: int):
130	        self.max_prefill_token_num = max_prefill_token_num
131	
132	        # long prefill seq
133	        self.clear()
134	
135	    def enabled(self):
136	        """Is enabled."""
137	        return self.seq is not None
138	
139	    def is_long_context(self, seq: 'SchedulerSequence'):
140	        """Is long context."""
141	        return seq.num_token_ids > self.max_prefill_token_num
142	
143	    def set_seq(self, seq: 'SchedulerSequence'):
144	        """Set the sequence currently being chunked."""
145	        self.seq = seq
146	        self.next_step = seq.num_history_ids
147	
148	        max_prefill_num = self.max_prefill_token_num
149	        input_mm = seq.get_input_multimodals()
150	        mm_for_chunk_limit = seq.get_chunk_limit_multimodals()
151	        self.multimodals = defaultdict(list)
152	
153	        for value in mm_for_chunk_limit.values():
154	            max_mm_size = max([v.end - v.start for v in value], default=0)
155	            max_prefill_num = max(max_prefill_num, max_mm_size)
156	
157	        has_multimodal = False
158	        for key, value in input_mm.items():
159	            # Only remaining multimodals are emitted by next_chunk_size().
160	            value = sorted(value, key=lambda x: x.start)
161	            self.multimodals[key] = value
162	
163	            has_multimodal = has_multimodal or len(value) > 0
164	
165	        self.max_prefill_num = max_prefill_num
166	        self.has_multimodal = has_multimodal
167	
168	    def multimodal_iter(self):
169	        """Multimodal iterator."""
170	        multimodal_data = []
171	        for modal_type, modal_datas in self.multimodals.items():
172	            if len(modal_datas) == 0:
173	                continue
174	            multimodal_data += [(modal_type, data) for data in modal_datas]
175	
176	        multimodal_data = sorted(multimodal_data, key=lambda x: x[1].start)
177	        for modal_type, data in multimodal_data:
178	            yield modal_type, data
179	
180	    def next_chunk_size(self):
181	        """Get the next chunk size and its remaining multimodal payloads."""
182	        seq = self.seq
183	        if seq is None:
184	            return 0, None
185	
186	        llm_chunk_size = min(seq.num_token_ids, self.max_prefill_num)
187	
188	        if len(self.multimodals) == 0:
189	            # no vlm inputs found
190	            return llm_chunk_size, None
191	
192	        start = seq.num_history_ids
193	        end = start + llm_chunk_size
194	        out_multimodals: MultiModalInputs = defaultdict(list)
195	        for modal_type, mm in self.multimodal_iter():
196	            assert mm.start >= start, 'multimodal data should be sorted by start'
197	            if mm.start >= end:
198	                # | start ... end ... mm.start ... mm.end |
199	                # if start is beyond threshold, stop
200	                break
201	
202	            if mm.end > end:
203	                # | start ... mm.start ... end ... mm.end |
204	                # Do not split a multimodal span; recompute from its start in
205	                # the next chunk instead.
206	                end = mm.start
207	                break
208	
209	            # | start ... mm.start ... mm.end ... end |
210	            out_multimodals[modal_type].append(mm)
211	
212	        return end - start, out_multimodals
213	
214	    def is_last_chunk(self):
215	        """Is last chunk."""
216	        if self.seq is None:
217	            return True
218	        return self.seq.num_token_ids <= self.max_prefill_num
219	
220	    def clear(self):
221	        """Clear."""
222	        self.seq: SchedulerSequence = None
223	        self.multimodals: MultiModalInputs = defaultdict(list)
224	        self.next_step: int = 0
225	        self.max_prefill_num: int = self.max_prefill_token_num
226	        self.has_multimodal = False
227	
228	    def update_step(self, inputs: ModelInputs):
229	        """Step chunker."""
230	        if self.seq is None:
231	            return
232	        if self.is_last_chunk():
233	            # last chunk should be treated as normal prefill
234	            return
235	        assert inputs.is_chunk
236	        chunk_size = inputs.max_q_seqlen
237	        self.next_step += chunk_size
238	        self.seq.set_step(self.next_step)
239	
240	        # remove used multimodals
241	        for mms in self.multimodals.values():
242	            while len(mms) > 0 and mms[0].end <= self.next_step:
243	                mms.pop(0)
244	        self.multimodals = dict((k, v) for k, v in self.multimodals.items() if len(v) > 0)
245	
246	    def check_enable(self):
247	        if not self.enabled():
248	            return
249	        if self.seq.status != MessageStatus.RUNNING:
250	            # A stopped long request no longer has a valid continuation.  We do
251	            # not send a cleanup-only worker forward here: normal prefill/decode
252	            # ignore chunk carry, and the next first chunk resets carry before
253	            # use.  Avoiding a no-work forward also keeps DP ranks aligned.
254	            self.clear()
255	
256	
257	class InputsMakerAsync:
258	    """Coordinate prefill, decode, and long-context input dispatch.
259	
260	    ``Scheduler`` owns admission, ordering, and cache/KV resources.  This class
261	    consumes the scheduler result and builds tensors only after resources have
262	    been granted.  Prefill-like work is represented by full ``ModelInputs``:
263	    prompt prefill, final long-context chunks, and eager non-final long chunks.
264	    Decode is represented by ``ModelInputsDelta`` and reuses persistent
265	    model-agent/strategy ``StepInputs`` that were created by earlier prefill and
266	    decode forwards.
267	
268	    ``running_seqs`` is local engine-loop state, not the scheduler's source of
269	    truth.  It tracks sequences already sent to the executor so this class can
270	    build decode deltas, evict invalid decode requests, and update the local
271	    view after outputs return.  Every dispatched forward also carries the
272	    strategy-specific ``extra_inputs``, sampling inputs, and stopping criteria
273	    expected by the model agent.
274	
275	    Long-context chunking is coordinated here because it spans scheduling
276	    policy and input construction.  ``LongContextChunker`` tracks one active
277	    long prefill and selects model-safe chunk boundaries, including indivisible
278	    multimodal spans.  Before tensors are created for each chunk, the scheduler
279	    reserves the chunk's KV ownership.  Non-final chunks are eager chunk
280	    forwards with no user-visible output; the final chunk is treated as normal
281	    prefill so it can merge into persistent decode state.
282	
283	    The current first-slice chunked-prefill policy intentionally uses separate
284	    forwards instead of one mixed decode+prefill tensor batch.  After a
285	    non-final chunk, runnable decode is preferred and remains on the existing
286	    delta/CUDAGraph path; at most one eager non-final long chunk is sent after
287	    decode gets a chance to run.  Preserve chunk flags such as
288	    ``is_chunk_multimodal`` and ``is_last_chunk`` because VLM and speculative
289	    decoding paths interpret them downstream.
290	    """
291	
292	    def __init__(
293	        self,
294	        executor: 'ExecutorBase',
295	        scheduler: 'Scheduler',
296	        adapter_manager: 'AdapterManager',
297	        engine_strategy: 'EngineStrategy',
298	        sampling_strategy: 'SamplingStrategy',
299	        model_agent_strategy: 'ModelAgentStrategy',
300	        config: InputsMakerConfig,
301	    ):
302	        self.executor = executor
303	        self.scheduler = scheduler
304	        self.adapter_manager = adapter_manager
305	        self.config = config
306	        self.spec_decoding = config.spec_decoding
307	        self.cache_config = scheduler.cache_config
308	        self.kernel_blocks_per_kv = self.cache_config.block_size // self.cache_config.kernel_block_size
309	        self.kernel_block_arange = torch.arange(self.kernel_blocks_per_kv, dtype=self.torch_int_dtype)
310	
311	        # strategies
312	        self.engine_strategy = engine_strategy
313	        self.sampling_strategy = sampling_strategy
314	        self.model_agent_strategy = model_agent_strategy
315	
316	        self._init_do_prefill(config)
317	
318	        self._short_prefill_turns_per_long_chunk = max(1, _envs.opt_ttft_short_turns)
319	        self._init_runtime_state()
320	
321	    def _init_runtime_state(self):
322	        """Initialize request-local scheduling state."""
323	        self._decode_count = 0
324	        self._last_forward_kind = None
325	        self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk = 0
326	        self.next_is_prefill = True
327	        self.forward_inputs = None
328	        self.running_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = []
329	        self.to_evict_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = []
330	        self.long_context_chunker = LongContextChunker(self.config.max_prefill_token_num)
331	
332	    def reset_runtime_state(self):
333	        """Discard request-local scheduling state after sleep cancels
334	        sessions."""
335	        self._decode_count = 0
336	        self._last_forward_kind = None
337	        self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk = 0
338	        self.next_is_prefill = True
339	        self.forward_inputs = None
340	        self.running_seqs = []
341	        self.to_evict_seqs.clear()
342	        self.long_context_chunker.clear()
343	
344	    def _init_do_prefill(self, config: InputsMakerConfig):
345	        if config.role == EngineRole.Prefill:
346	            self.do_prefill = self.do_prefill_pnode
347	        elif config.enable_chunked_prefill:
348	            self.do_prefill = self.do_prefill_chunked
349	        else:
350	            self.do_prefill = self.do_prefill_default
351	
352	    def _has_pending_last_long_context_chunk(self):
353	        """Check whether a running long context has only its final chunk
354	        left."""
355	        return self.long_context_chunker.enabled() and self.long_context_chunker.is_last_chunk()
356	
357	    def has_pending_long_context_chunk(self):
358	        """Check whether engine-local long-context chunk work can run."""
359	        self.long_context_chunker.check_enable()
360	        return self.long_context_chunker.enabled()
361	
362	    def _should_defer_long_context_chunk(self, prefill: bool):
363	        """Check whether the active long-context chunk should yield this
364	        loop."""
365	        if self.config.role == EngineRole.Prefill:
366	            return False
367	        if not self.long_context_chunker.enabled():
368	            return False
369	        if self.long_context_chunker.is_last_chunk():
370	            if len(self.running_seqs) == 0:
371	                return False
372	            return not prefill
373	        return getattr(self, '_last_forward_kind', None) == 'long_context_chunk'
374	
375	    def _is_long_context_chunk_turn_due(self):
376	        """Check if active long chunk should run before another short
377	        prefill."""
378	        return self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk >= self._short_prefill_turns_per_long_chunk
379	
380	    def _forward_kind(self, inputs: 'ModelInputs|None', delta: 'ModelInputsDelta|None'):
381	        """Classify a queued forward for long-context interleaving policy."""
382	        if inputs is None:
383	            if delta is not None:
384	                return 'decode'
385	            return None
386	        if inputs.is_chunk and not inputs.is_last_chunk:
387	            return 'long_context_chunk'
388	        if inputs.is_chunk:
389	            return 'last_long_context_chunk'
390	        if inputs.is_decoding:
391	            return 'decode'
392	        return 'prefill'
393	
394	    def _create_vision_model_inputs(self, messages: 'SeqList', model_inputs: ModelInputs):
395	        """Create vision model inputs."""
396	        batch_size = len(messages)
397	
398	        def __get_vlm_embeddings():
399	            """Get vlm input embeddings and indexings."""
400	            max_q_seq_length = model_inputs.seq_length.max().item()
401	            input_embeddings = [[
402	                emb.embeddings if isinstance(emb.embeddings, torch.Tensor) else torch.as_tensor(emb.embeddings)
403	                for emb in msg.input_embeddings
404	            ] for msg in messages]
405	            input_embedding_ranges = [
406	                torch.tensor([[emb.start, emb.end] for emb in msg.input_embeddings]) for msg in messages
407	            ]
408	            input_embedding_indexing = torch.zeros((batch_size, max_q_seq_length), dtype=torch.bool)
409	            for msg_id, msg in enumerate(messages):
410	                num_history_ids = msg.num_history_ids
411	                for emb in msg.input_embeddings:
412	                    # make slice index relative to embeddings
413	                    emb_start = emb.start - num_history_ids
414	                    emb_end = emb.end - num_history_ids
415	                    input_embedding_indexing[msg_id][emb_start:emb_end] = True
416	            return (input_embeddings, input_embedding_indexing, input_embedding_ranges)
417	
418	        def __has_values(input_multimodals):
419	            for input_mm in input_multimodals:
420	                for val in input_mm.values():
421	                    if len(val) > 0:
422	                        return True
423	            return False
424	
425	        has_embedding = any([len(msg.history_embeddings) > 0 for msg in messages])
426	        if has_embedding:
427	            has_embedding = any([len(msg.input_embeddings) > 0 for msg in messages])
428	
429	        has_multimodal = any([not msg.history_multimodals.empty() for msg in messages])
430	        input_multimodals = None
431	        if has_multimodal:
432	            input_multimodals = [msg.get_input_multimodals() for msg in messages]
433	            has_multimodal = __has_values(input_multimodals)
434	            if not has_multimodal:
435	                # no multimodal inputs
436	                input_multimodals = None
437	
438	        if not has_embedding and not has_multimodal:
439	            # no vision inputs
440	            return None
441	
442	        if has_embedding:
443	            # for inputs with embeddings
444	            (input_embeddings, input_embedding_indexing, input_embedding_ranges) = __get_vlm_embeddings()
445	        else:
446	            input_embeddings = None
447	            input_embedding_indexing = None
448	            input_embedding_ranges = None
449	
450	        history_lengths = model_inputs.history_lengths
451	        vision_embedding_inputs = VisionModelInputs(history_lengths=history_lengths,
452	                                                    input_embeddings=input_embeddings,
453	                                                    input_embedding_indexing=input_embedding_indexing,
454	                                                    input_embedding_ranges=input_embedding_ranges,
455	                                                    input_multimodals=input_multimodals)
456	        return vision_embedding_inputs
457	
458	    @property
459	    def torch_int_dtype(self):
460	        """Return int32 for cuda, int64 for others."""
461	        if self.executor.device_type == 'cuda':
462	            return torch.int32
463	        return torch.int64
464	
465	    def _set_adapter_ids(self, model_inputs: ModelInputs, messages: 'SeqList'):
466	        """Set adapter ids to model inputs."""
467	        if self.adapter_manager.num_adapters() <= 1:
468	            return
469	        adapter_names = [msg.adapter_name for msg in messages]
470	        local_adapter_ids = self.adapter_manager.get_adapter_ids(adapter_names)
471	        local_adapter_ids = model_inputs.seq_length.new_tensor(local_adapter_ids)
472	        model_inputs.local_adapter_ids = local_adapter_ids
473	
474	    def _map_to_kernel_block_offsets(self, block_offsets: torch.Tensor):
475	        """Converts manager block_offsets to kernel block_offsets.
476	
477	        Example:
478	
479	            # block_manager block size: 32 tokens,
480	            # Kernel block size: 16 tokens
481	            # kernel_blocks_per_kv = 2
482	            >>> block_manager block offsets = [0, 1, 3]
483	            >>> Result kernel block offsets = [0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 7]
484	
485	            # Each block_manager block id maps to 2 kernel block id:
486	            # block_manager block id 0 -> kernel block id [0, 1]
487	            # block_manager block id 1 -> kernel block id [2, 3]
488	            # block_manager block id 3 -> kernel block id [6, 7]
489	        """
490	        if self.kernel_blocks_per_kv == 1:
491	            return block_offsets
492	        batch_size = block_offsets.shape[0]
493	        block_offsets = (block_offsets[:, :, None] * self.kernel_blocks_per_kv +
494	                         self.kernel_block_arange[None, None, :]).reshape(batch_size, -1)
495	        return block_offsets
496	
497	    @torch.inference_mode()
498	    @record_function('create_model_inputs')
499	    def create_model_inputs(self, messages: 'SeqList', is_prefill: bool):
500	        """Create model inputs from messages.
501	
502	        Args:
503	            messages (SeqList): The input messages.
504	        """
505	        batch_size = len(messages)
506	        # history lengths
507	        history_lengths = torch.tensor([msg.num_history_ids for msg in messages])
508	
509	        # input ids
510	        token_ids = [msg.token_ids for msg in messages]
511	
512	        input_ids = torch.as_tensor(np.concatenate(token_ids))[None]
513	
514	        # seqlens
515	        is_decoding = not is_prefill
516	        if not is_decoding:
517	            seq_length = [len(tokens) for tokens in token_ids]
518	            seq_length = torch.tensor(seq_length, dtype=torch.long)
519	            max_q_seqlen = seq_length.max().item()
520	        else:
521	            max_q_seqlen = len(token_ids[0])
522	            seq_length = torch.full((batch_size, ), max_q_seqlen, dtype=torch.long)
523	        kv_seqlens = seq_length + history_lengths
524	        max_kv_seqlen = kv_seqlens.max().item()
525	        sum_kv_seqlen = kv_seqlens.sum().item()
526	
527	        # block offsets
528	        block_offsets = self.scheduler.get_block_tables(messages)
529	        block_offsets = _tensorlize_block_offsets(block_offsets, dtype=self.torch_int_dtype)
530	        block_offsets = self._map_to_kernel_block_offsets(block_offsets)
531	
532	        # num_ignored_history
533	        num_ignored_history = torch.tensor([msg.num_ignored_history for msg in messages])
534	
535	        # model_metas
536	        model_metas = [msg.model_meta for msg in messages]
537	
538	        # create model inputs for all required fields
539	        model_inputs = ModelInputs(
540	            input_ids=input_ids,
541	            seq_length=seq_length,
542	            history_lengths=history_lengths,
543	            block_offsets=block_offsets,
544	            is_decoding=is_decoding,
545	            num_ignored_history=num_ignored_history,
546	            max_q_seqlen=max_q_seqlen,
547	            max_kv_seqlen=max_kv_seqlen,
548	            sum_kv_seqlen=sum_kv_seqlen,
549	            model_metas=model_metas,
550	        )
551	
552	        # adapters
553	        self._set_adapter_ids(model_inputs, messages)
554	
555	        # vision inputs
556	        vision_model_inputs = self._create_vision_model_inputs(messages, model_inputs)
557	        model_inputs.vision_inputs = vision_model_inputs
558	
559	        # ssm
560	        if self.config.is_ssm:
561	            state_offsets = torch.tensor([msg.logical_state for msg in messages])
562	            model_inputs.state_offsets = state_offsets
563	            if (self.cache_config.enable_prefix_caching
564	                    and any(msg.prefix_cache.restore_state >= 0 for msg in messages)):
565	                # Pin restore checkpoints while the forward copies them into
566	                # runtime state slots; otherwise checkpoint eviction could race
567	                # with input prefetching for the next batch.
568	                self.scheduler.block_trie.acquire_state_checkpoint_restores(messages)
569	                if any(msg.prefix_cache.restore_state >= 0 and not msg.prefix_cache.restore_state_acquired
570	                       for msg in messages):
571	                    raise RuntimeError('Failed to acquire SSM prefix-cache restore checkpoint.')
572	                restore_src_offsets, restore_dst_offsets = _compact_state_prefix_cache_restore_offsets(messages)
573	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_offsets = restore_src_offsets
574	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_dst_offsets = restore_dst_offsets
575	            if self.cache_config.enable_prefix_caching and not is_decoding:
576	                # Prefill saves publish only after model_forward has copied the
577	                # runtime state to these reserved checkpoint offsets.
578	                save_state_offsets = [
579	                    self.scheduler.block_trie.reserve_state_checkpoint_for_seq(msg) for msg in messages
580	                ]
581	                save_src_offsets, save_dst_offsets = _compact_state_prefix_cache_save_offsets(messages,
582	                                                                                              save_state_offsets)
583	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_save_src_offsets = save_src_offsets
584	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_save_offsets = save_dst_offsets
585	
586	        if self.config.use_mrope:
587	            mrope_pos_ids = [msg.mrope_pos_ids for msg in messages]
588	            mrope_pos_ids = torch.as_tensor(np.concatenate(mrope_pos_ids)).T
589	            model_inputs.mrope_pos_ids = mrope_pos_ids
590	
591	        return model_inputs
592	
593	    @torch.inference_mode()
594	    @record_function('create_model_inputs_long_context')
595	    def create_model_inputs_long_context(self,
596	                                         seq: 'SchedulerSequence',
597	                                         chunk_size: int,
598	                                         multimodals: 'MultiModalInputs|None' = None):
599	        """Create model inputs for long context messages."""
600	        token_ids = seq.token_ids[:chunk_size]
601	        input_ids = torch.as_tensor(token_ids)[None]
602	        q_seqlens = torch.tensor([chunk_size])
603	        history_lens = torch.tensor([seq.num_history_ids])
604	
605	        # block offsets
606	        block_offsets = self.scheduler.get_block_tables([seq])
607	        block_offsets = torch.as_tensor(block_offsets[0], dtype=self.torch_int_dtype)[None]
608	        block_offsets = self._map_to_kernel_block_offsets(block_offsets)
609	
610	        # num_ignored_history
611	        num_ignored_history = torch.tensor([seq.num_ignored_history])
612	
613	        # model_metas
614	        model_metas = [seq.model_meta]
615	
616	        kv_seqlens = q_seqlens + history_lens
617	        max_kv_seqlen = kv_seqlens.item()
618	        sum_kv_seqlen = max_kv_seqlen
619	
620	        model_inputs = ModelInputs(
621	            input_ids=input_ids,
622	            seq_length=q_seqlens,
623	            history_lengths=history_lens,
624	            block_offsets=block_offsets,
625	            is_decoding=False,
626	            num_ignored_history=num_ignored_history,
627	            max_q_seqlen=q_seqlens.item(),
628	            max_kv_seqlen=max_kv_seqlen,
629	            sum_kv_seqlen=sum_kv_seqlen,
630	            model_metas=model_metas,
631	            is_chunk=True,
632	        )
633	
634	        # adapters
635	        self._set_adapter_ids(model_inputs, [seq])
636	
637	        # vision inputs
638	        if multimodals is not None and len(multimodals) > 0:
639	            vision_model_inputs = VisionModelInputs(
640	                history_lengths=model_inputs.history_lengths,
641	                input_multimodals=[multimodals],
642	            )
643	            model_inputs.vision_inputs = vision_model_inputs
644	
645	        # ssm
646	        if self.config.is_ssm:
647	            model_inputs.state_offsets = torch.tensor([seq.logical_state])
648	            if self.cache_config.enable_prefix_caching and seq.prefix_cache.restore_state >= 0:
649	                # Long-context chunks use the same restore pinning contract as
650	                # normal prefill batches.
651	                self.scheduler.block_trie.acquire_state_checkpoint_restore_for_seq(seq)
652	                if not seq.prefix_cache.restore_state_acquired:
653	                    raise RuntimeError('Failed to acquire SSM prefix-cache restore checkpoint.')
654	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_offsets = (seq.prefix_cache.restore_state, )
655	                model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_dst_offsets = (seq.logical_state, )
656	            if self.cache_config.enable_prefix_caching:
657	                # Save at the exact state step produced by this chunk forward.
658	                checkpoint_step = seq.num_history_ids + chunk_size
659	                save_state = self.scheduler.block_trie.reserve_state_checkpoint_for_seq(seq, step=checkpoint_step)
660	                if save_state >= 0:
661	                    model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_save_src_offsets = (seq.logical_state, )
662	                    model_inputs.state_prefix_cache_save_offsets = (save_state, )
663	
664	        # mrope
665	        if self.config.use_mrope:
666	            mrope_pos_ids = seq.mrope_pos_ids[:chunk_size]
667	            mrope_pos_ids = torch.as_tensor(mrope_pos_ids).T
668	            model_inputs.mrope_pos_ids = mrope_pos_ids
669	
670	        return model_inputs
671	
672	    @torch.inference_mode()
673	    @record_function('create_model_inputs_delta')
674	    def create_model_inputs_delta(self):
675	        """Create model inputs delta from messages."""
676	        batch_size = len(self.running_seqs)
677	        assert batch_size > 0
678	        num_decode_tokens = self.engine_strategy.get_num_decode_tokens()
679	        num_required_tokens = self.engine_strategy.get_num_required_tokens()
680	        max_q_seqlen = num_decode_tokens
681	        prealloc_size = self.engine_strategy.get_prealloc_size(True)
682	        valid_mask = self.scheduler.schedule_running(self.running_seqs,
683	                                                     num_required_tokens=num_required_tokens,
684	                                                     prealloc_size=prealloc_size)
685	
686	        valid_mask = np.array(valid_mask)
687	        indices_cpu = np.arange(0, batch_size)[valid_mask]
688	        valid_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = [self.running_seqs[i] for i in indices_cpu]
689	        invalid_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = [self.running_seqs[i] for i in range(batch_size) if not valid_mask[i]]
690	        if len(valid_seqs) == 0:
691	            return None, valid_seqs, invalid_seqs
692	
693	        # block offsets
694	        block_offsets = self.scheduler.get_block_tables(valid_seqs)
695	        block_offsets = _tensorlize_block_offsets(block_offsets, dtype=self.torch_int_dtype)
696	        block_offsets = self._map_to_kernel_block_offsets(block_offsets)
697	
698	        # sliding window
699	        if self.scheduler.cache_config.window_size > 0:
700	            num_ignored_history = torch.tensor([msg.num_ignored_history for msg in valid_seqs])
701	        else:
702	            num_ignored_history = torch.zeros(len(valid_seqs), dtype=torch.long)
703	
704	        # num_all_ids can be one decode step stale here: EngineLoop prefetches
705	        # the next inputs before _finish_forward_output() advances the sequence,
706	        # so +max_q_seqlen recovers this forward's kv length. The bug was adding
707	        # max_q_seqlen AGAIN in the reductions, plus using batch_size (which
708	        # counts scheduler-dropped invalid seqs) instead of reducing over the
709	        # valid seqs only (#4024).
710	        kv_seqlens = [seq.num_all_ids + max_q_seqlen for seq in valid_seqs]
711	        sum_kv_seqlen = sum(kv_seqlens)
712	        max_kv_seqlen = max(kv_seqlens)
713	
714	        output = ModelInputsDelta(
715	            indices=None,
716	            block_offsets=block_offsets,
717	            indice_cpu=indices_cpu,
718	            max_q_seqlen=max_q_seqlen,
719	            max_kv_seqlen=max_kv_seqlen,
720	            sum_kv_seqlen=sum_kv_seqlen,
721	            num_ignored_history=num_ignored_history,
722	        )
723	        decode_state_interval = self.cache_config.prefix_cache_decode_state_interval
724	        if (self.cache_config.enable_prefix_caching and self.config.is_ssm and decode_state_interval > 0
725	                and not self.spec_decoding and num_decode_tokens == 1):
726	            save_state_offsets = [
727	                self.scheduler.block_trie.reserve_decode_state_checkpoint_for_seq(seq, decode_state_interval)
728	                for seq in valid_seqs
729	            ]
730	            if any(state_idx >= 0 for state_idx in save_state_offsets):
731	                save_src_offsets, save_dst_offsets = _compact_state_prefix_cache_save_offsets(valid_seqs,
732	                                                                                              save_state_offsets)
733	                output.state_prefix_cache_save_src_offsets = save_src_offsets
734	                output.state_prefix_cache_save_offsets = save_dst_offsets
735	
736	        return output, valid_seqs, invalid_seqs
737	
738	    def create_model_inputs_delta_valid_only(self):
739	        """Create model inputs delta for valid running seqs only.
740	
741	        Only check validation, no resources will be scheduled.
742	        """
743	        from lmdeploy.pytorch.messages import MessageStatus
744	        batch_size = len(self.running_seqs)
745	
746	        valid_mask = [seq.status == MessageStatus.RUNNING for seq in self.running_seqs]
747	        if all(valid_mask):
748	            return None, self.running_seqs, []
749	
750	        valid_mask = np.array(valid_mask, dtype=bool)
751	        indices_cpu = np.arange(0, batch_size)[valid_mask]
752	        valid_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = [self.running_seqs[i] for i in indices_cpu]
753	        invalid_seqs: list[SchedulerSequence] = [self.running_seqs[i] for i in range(batch_size) if not valid_mask[i]]
754	
755	        num_decode_tokens = self.engine_strategy.get_num_decode_tokens()
756	        max_q_seqlen = num_decode_tokens
757	        # Keep +max_q_seqlen (num_all_ids may be one decode step stale), but do
758	        # not add it a second time in the reductions or use batch_size (#4024).
759	        kv_seqlens = [seq.num_all_ids + max_q_seqlen for seq in valid_seqs]
760	        if len(kv_seqlens) == 0:
761	            sum_kv_seqlen = 0
762	            max_kv_seqlen = 0
763	        else:
764	            sum_kv_seqlen = sum(kv_seqlens)
765	            max_kv_seqlen = max(kv_seqlens)
766	
767	        output = ModelInputsDelta(
768	            indices=None,
769	            block_offsets=None,
770	            indice_cpu=indices_cpu,
771	            max_q_seqlen=max_q_seqlen,
772	            max_kv_seqlen=max_kv_seqlen,
773	            sum_kv_seqlen=sum_kv_seqlen,
774	            num_ignored_history=None,
775	        )
776	
777	        return output, valid_seqs, invalid_seqs
778	
779	    def update_running_seqs(self, running: 'SeqList', inputs: 'ModelInputs|None'):
780	        """Update running seqs."""
781	        if self.config.role == EngineRole.Prefill:
782	            # p node will not update running seqs
783	            return
784	
785	        is_decoding = inputs is None
786	        if self.long_context_chunker.enabled() and not is_decoding and inputs.is_chunk:
787	            # long context chunk does not need to update running seqs
788	            self.long_context_chunker.update_step(inputs)
789	            return
790	
791	        if is_decoding:
792	            self.running_seqs = running
793	        else:
794	            self.running_seqs += running
795	
796	    def deactivate_evict_seqs(self):
797	        """Deactivate and evict seqs."""
798	        scheduler = self.scheduler
799	        to_evict_seqs = self.to_evict_seqs
800	        if len(to_evict_seqs) == 0:
801	            return
802	        # deactivate seqs(running -> ready)
803	        scheduler.deactivate_seqs(to_evict_seqs)
804	        # ready to waiting
805	        scheduler.evict_seqs(to_evict_seqs)
806	        self.to_evict_seqs.clear()
807	
808	    @torch.inference_mode()
809	    @record_function('make_forward_inputs')
810	    def _make_forward_inputs(self, prefill: bool, enable_empty: bool = False):
811	        """Make forward inputs for ModelAgent._async_step_background()"""
812	
813	        def __need_logits(seqs: 'SeqList'):
814	            """Need logits."""
815	            if self.spec_decoding:
816	                return True
817	            return any(seq.return_logits for seq in seqs)
818	
819	        def __need_routed_experts(seqs: 'SeqList'):
820	            """Need routed experts."""
821	            return any(seq.return_routed_experts for seq in seqs)
822	
823	        def __need_ce_loss(seqs: 'SeqList'):
824	            """Need input cross-entropy loss."""
825	            return any(seq.return_ce_loss for seq in seqs)
826	
827	        def __create_model_inputs(seqs):
828	            """Createe model inputs."""
829	            inputs = self.create_model_inputs(seqs, True)
830	            delta, valid_seqs, _ = self.create_model_inputs_delta_valid_only()
831	            self.running_seqs = valid_seqs
832	            extra_inputs = self.model_agent_strategy.make_extra_inputs(seqs, inputs)
833	            return inputs, delta, extra_inputs
834	
835	        def __create_inputs_chunk(running: 'SeqList', chunk_size: int, multimodals: 'MultiModalInputs|None'):
836	            inputs = self.create_model_inputs_long_context(running[0], chunk_size, multimodals)
837	            extra_inputs = self.model_agent_strategy.make_extra_inputs(running, inputs)
838	            return inputs, extra_inputs
839	
840	        def __reserve_long_context_chunk(seq: 'SchedulerSequence', chunk_size: int, is_last_chunk: bool):
841	            if self.config.role == EngineRole.Prefill:
842	                prealloc_size = 0
843	            elif is_last_chunk:
844	                prealloc_size = self.engine_strategy.get_prealloc_size(True)
845	            else:
846	                prealloc_size = 0
847	            return scheduler.reserve_long_context_chunk(seq,
848	                                                        chunk_size,
849	                                                        prealloc_size=prealloc_size,
850	                                                        is_last_chunk=is_last_chunk)
851	
852	        def __create_inputs_long_context_chunk():
853	            seq = self.long_context_chunker.seq
854	            chunk_size, multimodals = self.long_context_chunker.next_chunk_size()
855	            is_last_chunk = self.long_context_chunker.is_last_chunk()
856	            is_chunk_multimodal = self.long_context_chunker.has_multimodal
857	            if not __reserve_long_context_chunk(seq, chunk_size, is_last_chunk):
858	                return [], None, None, None
859	            running = [seq]
860	            if is_last_chunk:
861	                inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __create_model_inputs(running)
862	                inputs.is_chunk = True
863	                inputs.is_last_chunk = True
864	                self.long_context_chunker.clear()
865	            else:
866	                inputs, extra_inputs = __create_inputs_chunk(running, chunk_size, multimodals)
867	                delta = None
868	            inputs.is_first_chunk = False
869	            inputs.is_chunk_multimodal = is_chunk_multimodal
870	            self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk = 0
871	            return running, inputs, delta, extra_inputs
872	
873	        def __create_inputs_prefill(allow_long_prefill: bool = True, prefer_long_prefill: bool = False):
874	            if self.config.role == EngineRole.Prefill:
875	                prealloc_size = 0
876	            else:
877	                prealloc_size = self.engine_strategy.get_prealloc_size(True)
878	            scheduler_output = scheduler.schedule(is_prefill=True,
879	                                                  prealloc_size=prealloc_size,
880	                                                  allow_long_prefill=allow_long_prefill,
881	                                                  prefer_long_prefill=prefer_long_prefill)
882	            running = scheduler_output.running
883	            swap_in_map = scheduler_output.swap_in_map
884	            swap_out_map = scheduler_output.swap_out_map
885	
886	            inputs = None
887	            delta = None
888	            extra_inputs = None
889	            if len(running) == 1 and self.long_context_chunker.is_long_context(running[0]):
890	                # set long context chunker
891	                self.long_context_chunker.set_seq(running[0])
892	                if self.long_context_chunker.is_last_chunk():
893	                    # A prefix-cache restore can skip past a large multimodal
894	                    # span, leaving a tail that fits the multimodal-expanded
895	                    # chunk limit.  Treat it as normal prefill so the model sees
896	                    # the same single tail chunk as the no-cache path.  Do not
897	                    # set chunk flags here: spec decoding uses them as a
898	                    # cross-chunk carry protocol.
899	                    self.long_context_chunker.clear()
900	                    inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __create_model_inputs(running)
901	                else:
902	                    chunk_size, multimodals = self.long_context_chunker.next_chunk_size()
903	                    inputs, extra_inputs = __create_inputs_chunk(running, chunk_size, multimodals)
904	                    inputs.is_first_chunk = True
905	                    inputs.is_chunk_multimodal = self.long_context_chunker.has_multimodal
906	                    self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk = 0
907	            elif len(running) > 0:
908	                # create inputs
909	                inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __create_model_inputs(running)
910	            return running, inputs, delta, extra_inputs, swap_in_map, swap_out_map
911	
912	        def __create_short_or_normal_prefill_turn():
913	            nonlocal attempted_short_or_normal_prefill
914	            attempted_short_or_normal_prefill = True
915	            result = __create_inputs_prefill(allow_long_prefill=False)
916	            _, prefill_inputs, prefill_delta, _, _, _ = result
917	            if prefill_inputs is not None or prefill_delta is not None:
918	                self._short_prefill_turns_since_long_chunk += 1
919	            return result
920	
921	        def __is_empty_forward(forward_inputs: 'ModelInputs|None', forward_delta: 'ModelInputsDelta|None'):
922	            return forward_inputs is None and forward_delta is None
923	
924	        def __try_active_long_context_chunk():
925	            nonlocal attempted_long_work
926	            nonlocal active_long_chunk_blocked_by_kv
927	            attempted_long_work = True
928	            result = __create_inputs_long_context_chunk()
929	            _, chunk_inputs, chunk_delta, _ = result
930	            active_long_chunk_blocked_by_kv = __is_empty_forward(chunk_inputs, chunk_delta)
931	            return result
932	
933	        def __should_try_short_prefill_before_active_chunk():
934	            """Allow short/normal prefill quota before an active non-final
935	            chunk."""
936	            if self.long_context_chunker.is_last_chunk():
937	                return False
938	            if not scheduler.has_waiting():
939	                return False
940	            return not self._is_long_context_chunk_turn_due()
941	
942	        def __has_no_forward():
943	            return __is_empty_forward(inputs, delta)
944	
945	        def __can_fallback_to_short_after_long_work():
946	            if not __has_no_forward():
947	                return False
948	            if not attempted_long_work:
949	                return False
950	            if active_long_chunk_blocked_by_kv:
951	                return False
952	            if attempted_short_or_normal_prefill:
953	                return False
954	            return scheduler.has_waiting()
955	
956	        def __can_try_short_prefill_after_defer():
957	            if not __has_no_forward():
958	                return False
959	            if not deferred_long_context_chunk:
960	                return False
961	            if self._is_long_context_chunk_turn_due():
962	                return False
963	            return scheduler.has_waiting()
964	
965	        def __can_retry_deferred_active_chunk():
966	            return __has_no_forward() and deferred_long_context_chunk and self.long_context_chunker.enabled()
967	
968	        scheduler = self.scheduler
969	        logger.debug(f'Make forward inputs with prefill={prefill}, enable_empty={enable_empty}')
970	
971	        inputs = None
972	        delta = None
973	        running = []
974	        extra_inputs = None
975	        swap_in_map = {}
976	        swap_out_map = {}
977	        deferred_long_context_chunk = False
978	        attempted_long_work = False
979	        attempted_short_or_normal_prefill = False
980	        active_long_chunk_blocked_by_kv = False
981	
982	        # Bounded opt-TTFT prefill policy: protect decode before continuing
983	        # non-final long chunks, then allow a bounded number of short/normal
984	        # prefill turns before forcing one long-work turn. A long-work turn
985	        # continues the active chunker first, otherwise it admits one waiting
986	        # long prefill through the scheduler.
987	        self.long_context_chunker.check_enable()
988	        if self.long_context_chunker.enabled():
989	            if self._should_defer_long_context_chunk(prefill):
990	                deferred_long_context_chunk = True
991	            elif __should_try_short_prefill_before_active_chunk():
992	                # After a decode turn, keep the short/normal prefill quota in
993	                # front of active long chunks; otherwise decode -> long can
994	                # repeat and small waiting requests remain gated by the active
995	                # chunker even while the long-work turn is not due.
996	                (
997	                    running,
998	                    inputs,
999	                    delta,
1000	                    extra_inputs,
1001	                    swap_in_map,
1002	                    swap_out_map,
1003	                ) = __create_short_or_normal_prefill_turn()
1004	                if __is_empty_forward(inputs, delta):
1005	                    running, inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __try_active_long_context_chunk()
1006	            else:
1007	                running, inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __try_active_long_context_chunk()
1008	        elif prefill:
1009	            # prefill
1010	            has_waiting_long_prefill = scheduler.has_waiting_long_prefill()
1011	            if has_waiting_long_prefill and not self._is_long_context_chunk_turn_due():
1012	                (
1013	                    running,
1014	                    inputs,
1015	                    delta,
1016	                    extra_inputs,
1017	                    swap_in_map,
1018	                    swap_out_map,
1019	                ) = __create_short_or_normal_prefill_turn()
1020	                if __has_no_forward():
1021	                    (
1022	                        running,
1023	                        inputs,
1024	                        delta,
1025	                        extra_inputs,
1026	                        swap_in_map,
1027	                        swap_out_map,
1028	                    ) = __create_inputs_prefill(prefer_long_prefill=True)
1029	            else:
1030	                (
1031	                    running,
1032	                    inputs,
1033	                    delta,
1034	                    extra_inputs,
1035	                    swap_in_map,
1036	                    swap_out_map,
1037	                ) = __create_inputs_prefill(prefer_long_prefill=has_waiting_long_prefill)
1038	                attempted_long_work = has_waiting_long_prefill
1039	
1040	        # Waiting-long admission failure can still fall back to short prefills.
1041	        # Active-long reservation failure means KV is pinned by running work;
1042	        # admit decode only so existing requests can drain blocks.
1043	        if __can_fallback_to_short_after_long_work():
1044	            (
1045	                running,
1046	                inputs,
1047	                delta,
1048	                extra_inputs,
1049	                swap_in_map,
1050	                swap_out_map,
1051	            ) = __create_short_or_normal_prefill_turn()
1052	
1053	        # try decoding
1054	        if inputs is None and len(self.running_seqs) > 0 and self.config.role != EngineRole.Prefill:
1055	            prefill = False
1056	            delta, running, invalid_seqs = self.create_model_inputs_delta()
1057	            self.to_evict_seqs = invalid_seqs
1058	            extra_inputs = None
1059	
1060	        if __can_try_short_prefill_after_defer():
1061	            (
1062	                running,
1063	                inputs,
1064	                delta,
1065	                extra_inputs,
1066	                swap_in_map,
1067	                swap_out_map,
1068	            ) = __create_short_or_normal_prefill_turn()
1069	
1070	        if __can_retry_deferred_active_chunk():
1071	            running, inputs, delta, extra_inputs = __try_active_long_context_chunk()
1072	
1073	        # reset decode count when non-decoding inputs are produced
1074	        if inputs is not None and not inputs.is_decoding:
1075	            self._decode_count = 0
1076	
1077	        # skip if enable empty
1078	        if inputs is None and delta is None:
1079	            return None
1080	
1081	        sampling_inputs = self.sampling_strategy.make_sampling_inputs(running)
1082	        if inputs is not None:
1083	            stopping_criteria = self.model_agent_strategy.make_stopping_criteria(running)
1084	        else:
1085	            stopping_criteria = None
1086	
1087	        return_logits = __need_logits(running)
1088	        return_routed_experts = __need_routed_experts(running)
1089	        return_ce_loss = __need_ce_loss(running)
1090	
1091	        return dict(
1092	            running=running,
1093	            inputs=inputs,
1094	            delta=delta,
1095	            swap_in_map=swap_in_map,
1096	            swap_out_map=swap_out_map,
1097	            sampling_inputs=sampling_inputs,
1098	            stopping_criteria=stopping_criteria,
1099	            return_logits=return_logits,
1100	            extra_inputs=extra_inputs,
1101	            return_routed_experts=return_routed_experts,
1102	            return_ce_loss=return_ce_loss,
1103	        )
1104	
1105	    def do_prefill_pnode(self):
1106	        return True
1107	
1108	    def do_prefill_default(self):
1109	        # decoding if no waiting
1110	        scheduler = self.scheduler
1111	        pending_last_chunk = self._has_pending_last_long_context_chunk()
1112	
1113	        # do decoding if not waiting
1114	        if not scheduler.has_waiting() and not pending_last_chunk:
1115	            self._decode_count = 0
1116	            return False
1117	        if pending_last_chunk:
1118	            return True
1119	
1120	        # force prefill if too many consecutive decode rounds
1121	        if self._decode_count >= self.config.prefill_interval:
1122	            return True
1123	
1124	        # do prefill if too much tokens
1125	        waiting = scheduler.waiting
1126	        token_count = 0
1127	        for seq in waiting:
